title: Ageing population reaches 18%, calls for stronger health systems
byline: Nearly 18 percent of Sri Lanka’s population is now aged 60 years and above, reflecting a clear trend of population ageing,  Population Association of Sri Lanka (PASL), President Prof. Manori Weeratunga, said.

title: Breaking Down the Israel–Iran Conflict: What We Know So Far - Day 3
byline: This guide answers the most important questions about the Israel Iran war that is unfolding right now. The United States and Israel have launched major military strikes on Iran and Iran has responded with missile attacks across the region. This is one of the most serious escalations in the Middle East in years.
